categories.title: SONGS THAT START WITH...
categories.theme: Each clue is a song identified by its opening lyrics — answer is the song title and artist as given in the source

clues.clue: This song opens with: "When I find myself in times of trouble, Mother Mary comes to me / Speaking words of wisdom, let it be..."
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the opening lyrics 'When I find myself in times of trouble, Mother Mary comes to me / Speaking words of wisdom, let it be...' and source answer is '"Let it Be" by the Beatles'.

clues.clue: This song begins: "Coming out of my cage / And I've been doing just fine..."
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the opening lyrics 'Coming out of my cage / And I've been doing just fine...' and source answer is '"Mr. Brightside" by The Killers'.

clues.clue: This song opens with: "You walked into the party like you were walking onto a yacht."
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the opening lyric 'You walked into the party like you were walking onto a yacht.' and source answer is '"You're So Vain" by Carly Simon'.

clues.clue: This song begins: "We come from the land of the ice and snow / From the midnight sun, where the hot springs flow..."
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the opening lyrics 'We come from the land of the ice and snow / From the midnight sun, where the hot springs flow...' and source answer is '"Immigrant Song" by Led Zeppelin'.

clues.clue: This song's opening lyrics are: "ALL ABOARD! (maniacal laughter)"
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the opening lyrics 'ALL ABOARD! (maniacal laughter)' and source answer is '"Crazy Train" by Ozzy Osbourne'.

categories.title: SONG LYRICS — NAME THAT TUNE
categories.theme: Each clue contains opening lyrics from a song; the answer is the song title (and artist)

clues.clue: These famous opening words belong to a beloved animated franchise theme: 'I wanna be the very best...'
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the opening lyrics 'I wanna be the very best...' and source answer is '"Pokémon Theme" by Jason Paige'.

clues.clue: A 90s sitcom anthem begins: 'Now this is the story all about how / My life got flipped, turned upside down...'
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the opening lyrics 'Now this is the story all about how / My life got flipped, turned upside down...' and source answer is '"Yo Home to Bel-Air"'.

clues.clue: These Wham! lyrics appear in a famous 1984 hit: 'I'm never gonna dance again, guilty feet have got no rhythm.'
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the lyric 'I'm never gonna dance again, guilty feet have got no rhythm' and identifies it as a Wham! hit single; source answer is 'Careless Whisper'.

clues.clue: Identify the Outkast song that opens: 'My baby don't mess around because she loves me so, and this I know for sure.'
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the opening lyrics 'My baby don't mess around because she loves me so, and this I know for sure.' and source answer is '"Hey Ya!" by Outkast'.

clues.clue: Prince opens this song with a spoken word address: 'Dearly beloved, we have gathered here today to get through this thing called life.'
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally contains the lyrics 'Dearly beloved, we have gathered here today to get through this thing called life.' and source answer is '"Let's Go Crazy" by Prince'.

finals.title: JAZZ FIRSTS
finals.clue: This jazz trumpeter and composer became the first jazz musician ever to win the Pulitzer Prize for Music.
finals.fit_justification: Source question asks 'Who was the first Jazz Musician to win the Pulitzer Prize for Music' and source answer is 'Wynton Marsalis'.
